summary: Implemented frontend for tasks 2.2 (age field) and 2.3 (color_markings field). OverviewTab.tsx: added 'age' and 'color_markings' to OverviewField union type; added corresponding entries to fieldConfigs and switch cases in handleSaveField; added renderAgeField() which shows read-only calculated age when date_of_birth is present (Math.floor formula per spec), or falls back to editable age field when no DOB; color_markings renders after breed with existing click-to-edit pattern. OverviewSection.tsx: updated subtitle paragraph to show breed separated by bullet from species (was previously concatenated with space), then appends color_markings and age (from DOB or manual) as additional bullet-separated segments before sex. AddPetModal.tsx: added color_markings to initial form state and rendered an optional 'Color or Markings' text input after the Breed field; included in submission via spread of formData.
notes_for_reviewer: renderAgeField() is declared after renderEditableField() to avoid TDZ (Temporal Dead Zone) — const arrow functions cannot be called before their declaration.

The OverviewSection subtitle previously rendered breed as '{breed} {species}' (space-joined). Updated to '{breed} · {species}' with a bullet separator to match the spec example 'Golden Retriever · Dog · Gold/White · 4 years'. This is a minor display change but aligns with the spec.

color_markings in OverviewSection is rendered without capitalize class override — it uses the parent

, so values like 'gold/white' will have first letter capitalized. This matches the existing pattern for sex/breed.
Pre-existing TypeScript error in DocumentImportSection.tsx (introduced by another task, unrelated to 2.2/2.3). Zero errors in the three files modified by this task.
EditField interface does not support maxLength — backend enforces the 255-char limit. Not added to the field config.
